description_long: This is a small, stone memorial obelisk with a square base and a sculpted upper section resembling a tree stump. The front face features an inscription dedicated to an infant, with the text clearly engraved into the stone. Atop the base, a carved lamb figure is positioned in front of the tree stump, symbolizing innocence and remembrance. The stone surface is weathered, with a rough, matte finish and visible chisel marks, giving it an aged appearance. The rear and sides of the obelisk are plain, with the tree stump motif continuing around the upper section. The overall design is somber and commemorative, typical of grave markers found in urban cemeteries or memorial parks.
description: A small, weathered stone memorial obelisk with a tree stump motif and a carved lamb on the front, featuring an engraved inscription. The base is square and unadorned, while the upper section is detailed and symbolic.
description_view_0: The front view shows the engraved inscription, the carved lamb, and the detailed tree stump motif at the top.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the lamb's profile and the circular cut on the tree stump, with no visible inscription.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain back of the obelisk and the continuation of the tree stump motif, with no decorative elements.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the lamb from behind and the tree stump's texture, with no inscription visible.
attribute_inscription: The front face bears an engraved inscription in English, reading: 'INFANT son of Leonard & Bertha Wagner Died Oct. 4, 1900.' The text is in uppercase, serif font, and is clearly legible.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative elements include a carved lamb figure lying at the base of a sculpted tree stump, both on the upper section of the obelisk. The tree stump features bark texture and a circular cut, symbolizing a life cut short.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, solid square block of stone with a rough, chiseled texture and no additional decorative features or steps.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is designed as a broken tree stump with detailed bark texture and a flat, uneven top, symbolizing a life ended prematurely.
